title: pteris pellucida var. stenophylla
intro: Pteris pellucida var. stenophylla is a type of fern commonly known as the 'Ruffled Chain Fern' or 'Stemless Lady Fern', characterized by its delicate, lacy fronds and ability to thrive in a variety of environments. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antiseptic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Pteris pellucida var. stenophylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, and is often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
